sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6602" key="a)naimo/sarkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναιμόσαρκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n6602.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with bloodless flesh,</tr_> of the cicada, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
